system.description: As a weapon, the foot spur does (STR-1)M Damage. As an anchor. it cannot penetrate materials with a Barrier Rating higher than 8, the Barrier Rating of most pavement. Each foot anchored increases the amount of weight a character can hold up or hang on to by a maximum of 50 kilograms. If the foot anchor is set into a material with a Barrier Rating of less than 8, each Barrier Rating point below 8 reduces the amount of weight by 5 kilograms. See Dangling and Holding, p. 51 of Cyberware Rules.
